description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical body composed of vertical wooden staves, each tightly fitted together. The barrel is reinforced by three prominent black metal hoops encircling its circumference—one near the top, one at the middle, and one near the base. The wood has a natural, slightly reddish-brown hue with visible grain patterns, giving it a rustic and weathered appearance. The top of the barrel is flat and appears to be made of the same wood as the sides, suggesting it is sealed with a wooden lid. There are no visible handles, spouts, or markings on the exterior. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for storage or transport of goods in urban or industrial settings.
description: A wooden barrel with three black metal hoops, flat wooden lid, and a rustic, weathered appearance. No handles or markings are visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cylindrical shape, three metal hoops, and flat wooden top.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, highlighting the curvature of the staves and the texture of the wood.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to the others, with clear visibility of the metal hoops and wood grain.
description_view_3: Side view, emphasizing the symmetry and even spacing of the metal hoops around the barrel.
